title: dysphania saxatilis
intro: Dysphania saxatilis, also known as coastal radish or sea purslane, is a type of succulent plant native to the coastal regions of Australia, New Zealand, and eastern Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dysphania saxatilis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health issues.
